===Pokémon Diamond and Pearl Adventure!===
[[File:Mars DPA.png|thumb|150px|Mars in the Diamond and Pearl Adventure! manga]]
Mars first appeared in this manga at the [[Valley Windworks]], attempting to steal the energy from the power plant. [[Hareta]] and {{OBP|Jun|DPA}} managed to defeat her.

She later reappeared in a special chapter, in which she attempted and failed to capture a {{p|Deoxys}}. During her battle with it, her {{p|Kangaskhan}} went out of control, requiring the help of Hareta and the Deoxys to stop it from rampaging.

Mars later, alongside [[Saturn]], assists Hareta, Mitsumi and the others in defeating Dialga when its powers threaten to destroy Sinnoh.

|desc={{p|Purugly}} is Mars's main Pokémon. It was first used in a Tag Battle against Jun and Hareta. Mars gained the upper hand when it turned out the power. However, {{TP|Hareta|Shinx}}'s {{m|Spark}} put the power back on which threw Purugly off guard, defeating it. Purugly then appeared in ''[[DPAS2|Deoxys, The Phantom Pokémon! (Part 2)]]'', in which it was easily defeated by {{p|Deoxys}}.}}

|desc={{p|Kangaskhan}} was used in the special chapter in which she battled {{p|Deoxys}} after it easily defeated Mars's Purugly. When Kangaskhan used Outrage, it made her go on a rampage, even destroying Mars's Poké Ball in the process. Piplup's {{m|Brine}} stops her and she returns back to normal.

Kangaskhan's only known move is {{m|Outrage}}.}}

Magnezone's only known move is {{m|Magnet Bomb}}.}}
